commit.message:
Fix traffic-light colors for T columns

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Implement fail-closed storage, publish, and cleanup contracts

Replace fail-open patterns across storage, snapshot, and publish paths
with atomic fail-closed contracts:

Phase 1 - SCP persistence:
- Fix SCP GC to delete by complete ledger boundary (not row limit)
- Make SCP quorum-set export fail on missing qsets

Phase 2 - Durable-before-publish:
- Add BucketList::flush_pending_persist() with error propagation
- Background persist thread accumulates and returns I/O errors
- persist_hot_archive_buckets returns Result, gates publish
- Publish aborts on missing hot-archive bucket file

Phase 3 - Complete cleanup keep-sets:
- Expand bucket cleanup to include DB HAS, publish queue, and
  snapshot manager references (prevents premature file deletion)

Phase 4 - Fail-closed reads and atomicity:
- Add result-returning APIs to Searchable snapshot layers
- Fix HotArchiveBucketSnapshot::load_keys error swallowing
- Add try_iter() for hot archive with error propagation
- Update RPC/HTTP callers to propagate bucket read errors
- Replace 4 separate RwLocks with 2 paired SnapshotPair locks

Closes #1221

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: AI session knowledge tools for GitHub Copilot CLI

9 Python tools that turn Copilot CLI session-state into a searchable
knowledge base with FTS5 full-text search + semantic vector search.

Features:
- Full-text search (FTS5 with BM25 ranking)
- Semantic vector search (multi-provider: Fireworks, OpenAI, etc.)
- Hybrid search (Reciprocal Rank Fusion)
- Knowledge extraction (mistakes, patterns, decisions, tools)
- Pre-task briefing for AI agents
- Knowledge recording API
- Watch mode for real-time indexing
- Trilingual support (English, Vietnamese, Japanese)
- 60+ technology tags (AWS, TypeScript, React Native, Java, etc.)
- Windows + WSL shared setup
- Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux)
- Zero external dependencies (Python 3.10+ stdlib only)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(research): loop-deconfounded therapy estimation (EXP-1881–1888)

8 experiments decomposing AID loop compensation to assess true
therapy parameter accuracy across 11 patients.

Key findings:
- EXP-1881: Loop overwhelmingly REDUCES delivery (8/11 patients)
- EXP-1882: Profile ISF ~2× too high during loop-inactive windows
- EXP-1883: Loop hides 65% of CR error via silent correction
- EXP-1884: Scheduled basal delivered only 4% of the time
- EXP-1885: Overnight drift +2.8 mg/dL/h despite loop management
- EXP-1886: 8/11 basal too high, 7/11 CR too low per loop signals
- EXP-1887: Raw params more stable (9% vs 26%) — loop masks drift
- EXP-1888: Mean 2.5/3 therapy params wrong per patient

Core insight: AID loops are so effective at compensation that they
render therapy settings unobservable. Settings are wrong for nearly
every patient, but outcomes are acceptable because the loop
continuously corrects. The 'oscillation paradox' — scheduled basal
is too high (loop suspends) but effective rate is too low (glucose
rises) — is a fundamental limitation of incorrect settings under
AID management.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Build offline mode test suite with sync conflict scenarios (#371)

Created comprehensive test suite for offline-first behavior and sync
conflict resolution using Last-Write-Wins strategy:

OfflineModeTest (8 test cases):
- Local writes succeed when completely offline
- Multiple sets logged offline persist to local database
- Sync operations queued when offline
- Offline to online transition triggers sync queue flush
- Data integrity maintained through offline-online-offline cycles
- Intermittent connectivity does not block local writes
- Workout completion persists offline
- Network timeout during sync does not affect local data

SyncConflictTest (8 test cases):
- Last write wins when local modification is newer
- Last write wins when remote modification is newer
- Concurrent edits to different fields merge correctly
- Identical timestamps favor local version
- Sync interruption preserves partial progress
- Resume sync after interruption skips already-synced entities
- Deleted entity locally propagates to cloud on sync
- Conflicting delete and edit resolves to delete

All tests use MockK + kotlinx.coroutines.test (runTest) following
existing repository test patterns. Tests verify offline-first data
persistence, network state transitions, and conflict resolution logic.

Closes #333

Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix repository failure tests: correct mock patterns and retry verification

Changed Flow error mocking from flowOf().also { throw } to flow { throw }:
- flowOf().also { throw } throws during mock setup, not during collection
- flow { throw } throws during collection, allowing .catch { } to fire

All retry expectations match actual retryWithBackoff implementation:
- Retryable (3x): SQLiteDatabaseLockedException, SQLiteDiskIOException, IOException
- Non-retryable (1x): RuntimeException, IllegalStateException, IllegalArgumentException

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: cache-busting for sessionStorage — stale data hid delayed badges

Added CACHE_VERSION key to sessionStorage. Bumping version invalidates
old cached JSON that was missing is_delayed field. Also cleans up
old-format cache keys.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix force-approval spam, conflict warning dedup, TE coverage signal, PE worker status

Bug fixes:
- Force-approval: each reviewer agent now checks if it's actually a required
  reviewer for the PR before posting a force-approval comment. Previously all
  3 agents (PE, PM, Architect) would post redundant force-approvals even when
  only 2 were needed for merge.
- Conflict warnings: check existing PR comments before posting duplicate
  conflict detection warnings. PR #317 had 6 identical warnings from 6 commits.
- TE coverage signal: added CheckTestCoverageCompleteAsync() that sets status
  to 'coverage met, tests complete' when all merged code PRs are tested. The
  HealthMonitor picks this up to emit testing.coverage.met, unblocking the
  Testing→Review phase transition. Previously this signal was NEVER emitted.
- PE worker status: worker PEs now show 'Working on tasks' instead of the
  misleading 'Orchestrating tasks' which is leader-only behavior.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Prominent plateau alert banner on Progress screen (#370)

* Enhance plateau alert cards with severity levels and coaching CTA

- Add PlateauSeverity enum (MILD, MODERATE, SEVERE) based on weeks duration
- Calculate severity: 3-4 weeks = mild, 5-6 = moderate, 7+ = severe
- Add daysSinceLastPR field to PlateauAlert model
- Implement color coding: amber for mild, orange for moderate, red for severe
- Add "Get Coaching Advice" CTA button that navigates to AI Coach with pre-filled prompt
- Add NavigateToCoach effect with prompt parameter in ProgressContract
- Sort plateau alerts by severity (severe first) then by weeks duration
- Add empty state when no plateaus detected: "No plateaus detected — keep crushing it!"
- Show days since last PR alongside weeks stalled in alert details
- Update Spanish translations for new strings
- Wire coaching navigation through savedStateHandle to CoachChatRoute

Closes #363

fix: correct 3 method descriptions in therapy-tbr-safety report

- Safety tiers: TBR-only thresholds for Low/Moderate/High, not compound
  OR logic with severe episodes (compound only for Critical tier)
- Safety-first protocol: cascading elif (first match wins), not additive
  IF/IF/IF. Stacking alert not implemented in v10 pipeline
- Patient g downgrade: caused by overcorrection rate (39.7%), not

Fix Azure CI by specifying Node.js 20.x version (#1626)

The CI pipeline was failing because it didn't specify a Node.js version,
relying on the pre-installed version on the build image (likely Node 18.x).
The latest @vscode/vsce uses undici which requires the File global API,
only available in Node.js 20+. This caused 'ReferenceError: File is not
defined' during vsce package.

Add NodeTool@0 task with Node 20.x to align with the GitHub workflow and
other Azure pipelines (nightly.yml, rc.yml) which already specify Node 20.

commit.message:
feat(seo): migrate previousSlugs to locale-aware previousSlugsByLocale

PROBLEM: previousSlugs was a flat array with no locale context. When a
job's FR slug changed but the old slug matched the active DE slug, the
safety nets removed it — causing 404s for /fr/trouver-emploi-tessin/<old-slug>.

SOLUTION: New locale-aware format previousSlugsByLocale: { fr: [...], de: [...] }
with per-locale safety nets that only strip matches within the same locale.

Core changes:
- 6 helper functions in dedicated-crawler-common.mjs:
  addPreviousSlugForLocale, getPreviousSlugsForLocale, getAllPreviousSlugs,
  cleanPreviousSlugsPerLocale, syncLegacyPreviousSlugs, mergePreviousSlugsByLocale
- Rewrote captureLostSlugs() to write per-locale
- Fixed all 4 safety nets (hardenJobLocaleFields, writeJobsCrawlerSlice,
  regenerate-slugs-by-locale, cleanPreviousSlugsPerLocale)
- Fixed all write points (mergePreserveLocaleData, preferJob)
- Fixed build plugin bridge page generation (locale-aware)
- Fixed runtime consumers (JobBoard.tsx, router.ts, localeJobsSplitPlugin)
- Updated scatter-jobs, find-orphan, assemble-jobs-dataset

Data migration:
- Recovered 106 previousSlugs lost in commit 7723f77f1 cleanup
- Migrated 3680 flat previousSlugs to locale-aware format across 111 files
- Legacy flat previousSlugs kept in sync for backward compatibility

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test: CRC-verify all files mentioned in issue #58

inner files for every archive variant from the issue:

  .rr.cbr, .av.cbr — verifies jpg (0xda70b16c) and png (0xafb0ac62)
- SFX (6 variants): RAR3 dos/wincon/wingui .exe, RAR5 linux .bin,
  wincon/wingui .exe — verifies testfile.txt (0x6ec18ffe) and
  acknow.txt (0x4d56c79d)

fixed in the previous commit.

fix(seo): align sitemap previousSlug paths with bridge page locale paths

The sitemap generator was adding ALL previousSlugs under the Italian
path (/cerca-lavoro-ticino/), but the bridge page generator correctly
places locale-specific previousSlugs under their locale prefix
(e.g. /en/find-jobs-ticino/, /fr/trouver-emploi-tessin/).

This mismatch caused 4 sitemap URLs to reference pages that didn't
exist in dist/, blocking deploy at the validate-sitemap-links step.

Fix: Rewrite the sitemap previousSlug section to mirror the bridge
page generator's locale-aware logic:
- previousSlugsByLocale[locale] entries → locale-specific path
- Legacy flat previousSlugs → Italian path (matching bridge behavior)
- Added deduplication via prevSlugSitemapPaths set

release: v1.0.2 (#29)

* chore: update branching strategy and CI for release workflow

- CONVENTIONS.md: replace branch strategy with release-branch model
  (fix/* → release/X.Y.x → main, long-lived release branches)
- CI: add release/** to push and pull_request triggers
- Add version bump advisory and GitHub Releases policy

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: normalize warning_pct to 2 decimal places for lossless UI round-trip

The frontend form uses integers 0-100 but the backend stores 0-1 decimal.
Values with excess precision (e.g., 0.3333) would lose data on edit via
Math.round(). Adding a Pydantic field_validator with ROUND_HALF_UP on both
LimitCreate and LimitUpdate ensures the stored value always maps cleanly
to a whole percentage.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: draw continuous average trend line across sparse historical data

Use null instead of omitting the average property so Recharts
connectNulls draws a continuous dashed line through gaps. Also guard
the tooltip against null values to avoid showing misleading \.

Adds backend test documenting _average_series behavior with empty
periods (months with zero expenses are excluded from the average).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: limit Insights transactions to first page with View all link (#27)

Remove infinite scroll from the Insights transaction panel. Only show
the first page (~20 items) and add a View all link that navigates to
/transactions with the current filters applied.

Frontend was sending category_ids (ignored by Pydantic) instead of
filters: [{filter_type, filter_value}]. Also fixed edit form loading
f.id (filter record UUID) instead of f.filter_value (category UUID).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: extend trend line to full period and use 1-based days (#26)

_to_cumulative now accepts period_days so the current series extends
to the end of the month/week even when there are no recent expenses.
get_day_of_period returns 1-based indices so the X-axis starts at
day 1 instead of misleading day 0.

- Update docstring and ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect 1-based day index

- Cap period_days as hard limit (ignore timezone-shifted outliers)

commit.message:
fix: use fresh decoder for non-solid RAR4 to prevent state leakage

The PPMd decode loop now runs past file size to consume end-of-file
markers. This mutates the decoder's model state. For non-solid files
that reused the decoder via get_or_insert_with, the second file would
get corrupted model state from the first file's post-EOF decoding.

Fix: reset the decoder to None before each non-solid file, forcing
a fresh Rar29Decoder::new().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Auto-correct file paths missing project subdirectory prefix

- ConflictDetector.ResolvePathsAsync: matches AI-generated short paths
  (e.g., Components/Header.razor) against the repo tree and rewrites them
  to the correct full path (src/MyProject/Components/Header.razor)
- InferProjectPrefix: when no exact suffix match exists, finds the most
  common project root among repo files sharing the same directory name
- PullRequestWorkflow.ResolveFilePathsAsync: exposes path resolution for
  both local workspace and GitHub API commit flows
- EngineerAgentBase: resolves paths after parsing AI output, before writing
  to workspace or committing via API
- Conflict detection now runs AFTER path resolution for fewer false warnings

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(research): CR improvement & meal analysis (EXP-1871–1878)

Profile CR is 38% too high for ALL 11 patients — patients need ~60% more
insulin per carb than profiles suggest. AID loop compensates with +2.0U
extra IOB post-meal, masking the miscalibration.

EXP-1871: BOTH_TIMING_AND_MAGNITUDE — model underpredicts rise by 134 mg/dL
EXP-1872: UNPREDICTABLE — per-gram excursion CV=1.17, large meals saturate
EXP-1873: PRE_BOLUS_REDUCES_EXCURSION — 22 mg/dL improvement (9/10)
EXP-1874: CR_SIGNIFICANTLY_MISCALIBRATED — 38% too high (11/11) ⭐
EXP-1875: MODERATE_CIRCADIAN_CR — 28% range, 9/11 breakfast < evening
EXP-1876: LOOP_ACTIVELY_COMPENSATES — 83% active, +2.0U post-meal
EXP-1877: UAM_MORE_SYSTEMATIC — announced RMSE 3.4× larger than UAM
EXP-1878: CR_ESTIMATOR_IMPROVES — equation method +20%, wins 7/11

Key insight: wrong CR poisons the entire model during meal windows.
Announced meal RMSE (39.3) is 3.4× UAM RMSE (11.6) because wrong CR
contaminates the supply/demand model. Fix CR > detect UAM.

Equation-based CR estimator: CR = carbs × ISF / (excursion + bolus × ISF)
generalizes temporally and improves 19.8% over profile.

1 experiment script, 1 report, 8 figures

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Phase113: オンボーディングウィザード UI スケルトン（Dropbox 路線） (#121)

* feat: Phase113 - オンボーディングウィザード UI スケルトン（Dropbox 路線）

- WizardStepState / WizardRoute / WizardState モデル追加 (Core.Wizard)
- IWizardStateService / WizardStateService 実装 (schemaVersion・破損バックアップ対応)
- AppDataPaths.WizardStateFile() 追加
- IDropboxVerifyService / DropboxVerifyService: Credential/Discovery/Preflight 3層検証
- Blazor ウィザードコンポーネント群: WelcomePage / RouteSelectionPage / SharePointPlaceholderPage / DropboxOAuthPage / ConnectionTestPage / WizardApp
- DashboardApp.razor: 初回起動検出・ウィザード表示・セットアップやり直しメニュー
- Dashboard.csproj に Providers.Dropbox 参照追加
- App.xaml.cs に IWizardStateService / ICredentialStore / IDropboxOAuthService / IDropboxVerifyService DI 登録

Closes #113
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: PR #121 レビュー対応 — 8件の指摘を修正

- ByteArrayContent 修正: StringContent が charset=utf-8 を付与する問題を修正 (DropboxVerifyService)
- schemaVersion 前方互換: 上位バージョンは best-effort 読み込みに変更、旧バージョンのみ backup+reset (WizardStateService)
- tmp ファイル後始末: IOException 時に .tmp ファイルを削除するクリーンアップを追加 (WizardStateService)
- ストリームをクローズしてから BackupAndReset: Windows ファイルロック対策 (WizardStateService)
- 初回起動検出修正: 完了済みでも CredentialStore 不在の場合はウィザードを再表示 (DashboardApp)
- WizardApp 無駄な SaveAsync 除去: InProgress は ToSafeForPersistence で NotStarted に戻るためスキップ
- OnRouteSelected の二重 SaveAsync 削除: Step3=InProgress 代入と2回目の save を削除
- WizardStateServiceTests 追加: ファイル不在/JSON破損/旧schema/上位schema/InProgress変換/IsFirstRun
- DropboxVerifyServiceTests 追加: Credential欠落/Discovery失敗/Preflight失敗/ソフトエラー/全成功

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: PR #121 2回目レビュー対応 — 4件の指摘を修正

- DashboardApp: AppKey + AccessToken の両方が存在しない場合にウィザードを再表示
- WizardState.ToSafeForPersistence: 上位 schemaVersion 読み込み時も保存は CurrentSchemaVersion にダウングレード（データ消失防止）
- WizardStateService: XML doc コメントを実装に合わせ更新（旧バージョン/パース失敗のみ backup+reset と明記）
- DropboxVerifyServiceTests: 未使用ローカル変数 var client を削除

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: PR #121 3回目レビュー対応 — 4件の指摘を修正

- WizardStateService.SaveAsync: catch(IOException) → catch(Exception) + finally で全例外時に tmp 削除
- RouteSelectionPage: 2枚の路線カードに role/tabindex/onkeydown を追加（アクセシビリティ対応）
- WizardApp.ResumeStep: Step4ConnectionTest != Verified の条件を追加（コメントと実装を一致）

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: PR #121 レビュー第4回対応 - クレデンシャル欠損時の状態リセット・例外処理強化

- DashboardApp.razor: Dropbox クレデンシャル欠損で強制再表示時に WizardStateService.ResetAsync() を呼び出し、途中中断後の次回起動でもウィザードが再表示されるよう修正\n- WizardStateService.LoadAsync: UnauthorizedAccessException を捕捉してログ出力し初期状態を返す（アクセス権エラーでアプリが落ちる問題を解消）\n- WizardStateService.BackupAndResetAsync: ResetAsync を try/catch で囲み書き込み失敗時はメモリ上の初期状態へフォールバック

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
